name: sentry
description: Sentry error-tracking via MCP: slash commands + natural language untuk issues/events/fix/resolve (self-hosted & cloud).

sentry_host.title: Sentry Host
sentry_host.description: Host instance Sentry tanpa https:// (mis. sentry.company.com atau sentry.io)

sentry_token.title: Access Token
sentry_token.description: Sentry access token dengan scope: project:read, event:read, issue:read, issue:write, org:read, team:read
